description.en: Visa as the merchant experiences it: ~1.5-3% interchange fee per swipe, no choice but to accept (consumers carry it), service obligations to authorize and settle. The money side that funds the cardholders' free experience.
description.zh: 商户眼中的 Visa:每笔交易付约 1.5-3% 的回扣;基本没有不接的选择(消费者都带这卡);需要承担授权与结算的合规义务。这是支付网络的「收钱方」,它支付了持卡人的免费体验。
